name: Chicken Tetrazzini Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, cook onions in margarine until tender.
2. Stir in flour, salt, sage, and pepper; cook until bubbly.
3. Stir in broth, milk, and mushrooms. Cook and stir until the mixture boils and is slightly thickened.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients except Swiss cheese.
5. Spoon into an ungreased 12x8-inch (2-quart) baking dish.
6. Sprinkle with Swiss cheese.
7. Bake, uncovered, in a preheated 350-degree oven for 20 to 30 minutes until hot and bubbly.
8. If desired, sprinkle with additional chopped fresh parsley. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
